briefs.title: Proposed: 20-Storey Rental Apartment at 5035 Beresford Street Up for Approval
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to consider rezoning 5035 Beresford Street to allow a 20-storey market rental apartment building with 215 units, ranging from studios to three-bedroom suites.
briefs.action_required: Track this rezoning decision if you own or lease property near 5035 Beresford Street, Burnaby.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
